description:
You are a threat intelligence analyst conducting anonymous data collection. You need to download two historical CSV datasets from the Tor Metrics portal and create a schema manifest for your ingestion pipeline.

1. Create the directory `/home/ga/Documents/TorTelemetry/`.
2. Navigate to the Tor Metrics raw data portal at `https://metrics.torproject.org/stats.html`.
3. Locate and download the CSV data for "Number of relays and bridges" (servers). Save or move this file to `/home/ga/Documents/TorTelemetry/servers.csv`.
4. Locate and download the CSV data for "Estimated number of clients in the Tor network" (clients). Save or move this file to `/home/ga/Documents/TorTelemetry/clients.csv`.
5. Inspect the first line (column headers) of both downloaded CSV files.
6. Create a JSON manifest file exactly at `/home/ga/Documents/TorTelemetry/ingest_manifest.json` with the following structure:
